description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🔄 Content updated (published: June 3, 2026)

Hanno City will provide support grants to organizations operating care facilities within the city to help them continue operations amid rising costs. Eligible organizations have already been notified.

【Grant Amounts】
Visit-based services: ¥70,000 per facility
Day services: ¥150,000 per facility
Residential services: ¥10,000 per bed

【Application Period】
June 15, 2026 (Monday) through August 31, 2026 (Monday)

【Required Documents】
Hanno City Care Facility Support Grant Application and Invoice Form, Pledge, Power of Attorney (required only if the grant applicant and the bank account holder are different)

【Application Method】
Each organization should fill out one application form listing all facilities it operates within Hanno City and submit it to the Care and Welfare Division (mail submission accepted)

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/kaigofukushika/oshirase/8820.html
summary: ℹ️ Hanno City Care Facility Support Grant
